thelonghorizon.title: The Long Horizon
thelonghorizon.author: A. Marsh
thelonghorizon.about: A first-contact epic following a generation ship that intercepts an unexplained signal.

signaldrift.title: Signal Drift

recommenders.why: for people who love time-loop puzzles

embercourt.author: L. Vance
embercourt.about: A political space opera about rival houses vying for control of a dying star's last resources.
